name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: FWD: Add your name to protect Roe v. Wade.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Did you see this?

| Wanted to make sure you saw this email from Susie, because it's important. Donald Trump will be announcing his Supreme Court pick in just under an hour, and no matter the nominee, we know one thing's for sure: _Roe v. Wade_ is Republicans' biggest target. **If you care about a woman's right to choose what to do with her own body, it's time to stand up and say so:**[**Tell Larry Hogan to stand with the women of Maryland and commit to protecting our reproductive rights.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9597/3889962327/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098B") Thanks, Jerusalem \----- ORIGINAL MESSAGE -----
From: Susie Turnbull
Subject: Add your name to protect Roe v. Wade [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9597/3889962327/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098B") Friend, This summer, the Supreme Court's overwhelmingly conservative decisions have taken us down a troubling path. They have turned a corner down a back alley. We can't ignore that. There were many incredibly harmful decisions, from voting rights to labor unions, but the most damaging was the decision by Justice Anthony Kennedy to retire from the court -- giving Donald Trump a second pick to the highest court in our nation. When it was announced, legendary Supreme Court reporter Jeffrey Toobin ominously predicted: "Abortion will be illegal in 20 states in 18 months." So where's Larry Hogan in this? **When asked last week what he thought of the future of the court, he flat-out refused to take a position.** [**Women and families can't afford for Governor Hogan to stay silent -- add your name to tell Larry Hogan to ensure Maryland's reproductive healthcare laws remain unchanged regardless of what happens on the Supreme Court.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9597/3889962327/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098B") | [SIGN ON »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9597/3889962327/VEsC/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098B")
---
Donald Trump will be announcing his Supreme Court nominee tonight, and one thing is for sure: Given the chance, that nominee will unquestionably vote to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. And because conservative governors know it will be overturned, you'll start to see state after state ban abortion outright.
Marylanders overwhelmingly do not trust Donald Trump and Senate Republicans to choose a justice that reflects our state's values. Despite this, Larry Hogan wants to "wait and see" who the next nominee is.
But we can't ignore his own history either. Throughout his life, dating to at least just after he graduated from college, Larry Hogan has been a staunch and vocal opponent of abortion. In 1980, as an aide to his father who was Prince George's County Executive, it was Governor Hogan's idea for the county administration to issue an executive order barring all abortions in county hospitals, except those where the life of the mother was at risk -- even banning abortions in the cases of pregnancies resulting from rape or incest.
He'd have you believe this was years ago, and long in the past. But during a June 2014 interview on the Dan Rodricks Show, Governor Hogan answered a listener's question regarding his position on abortion by saying that he has "personally always been opposed to abortion."
Now, more than ever, governors need to protect and advocate for the people they represent. We know Donald Trump and congressional Republicans won't. We need Larry Hogan to reassure Marylanders that despite his own troubling views on women's reproductive health, he will have the courage to protect Maryland's values.
[**Make Larry Hogan listen: Add your name to demand that he stand with the women of this state by committing to protect Maryland's reproductive healthcare laws.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9597/3889962327/VEsD/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/protect-roe-v-wade?source=OHQ07098B")
Thanks,
Susie

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9596/3889962327/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-the-fight-2?refcode=OHQ07098B")
---

* * *
PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, [click here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9591/3889962327/VEsB/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/update-your-information?source=emfooter"). Email is one of the most critical tools for our campaign, but you can let us know if you would like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9590/3889962327/VEsO/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=emfooter") going forward. If you'd like to [unsubscribe](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9593/3889962327/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), you can do so here. [Make a contribution to Ben and Susie here](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a687/7ab0e2c4/7fe1bcc2/349b9592/3889962327/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bjst_contribute?refcode=emfooter"). Contributions or gifts to Friends of Ben Jealous are not tax deductible.

name: BREAKING-NEWS@SherrodBrown.com
subject: ALERT: Renacci just raised millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | First, news broke about the shady Super PAC spending money on Renacci's behalf. Now, we find out about this: | | Jim Renacci raised **_more than $2 MILLION_** in the second quarter -- and that doesn't include self-funding.
---
We CANNOT let up the pressure for a single second. The only way to keep Sherrod fighting like hell for us in the Senate is by hitting every single goal.
We're bumping up our Rapid Response Fund goal to $15,000 by midnight. [**Rush in a contribution to help us hit our goal >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff9b7/4462dc26/55017b80/20079a81/696954195/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180709pm?refcode=sbe180709pm_m")

body:

[(Give right now to help us stop Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate!)](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd644/4fbb2af3/7c90cd80/5e8b277f/3942298969/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgyMC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk820-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
It's clear why the GOP is desperate: With everything from the Supreme Court to Obamacare on the line this fall, what happens in Nevada's Senate race will decide the future of this country.
**This news couldn 't have come at a worse time - because we're falling short of our fundraising goal this month, and we HAVE to raise another $15,000 before midnight.**
If we miss this goal, we could lose our chance to win in Nevada - and Democrats' best shot at taking back the Senate and protecting the future of the Supreme Court. **So I 'm counting on you to give right now:**

name: Team Beto
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
It's official, Friends: Donald Trump has picked his Supreme Court nominee, Judge Brett Kavanaugh. With this selection, Trump and his administration are clearly signaling what's at stake:
* Voting rights, civil rights and workers rights
* Healthcare and protections for those with pre-existing conditions
* A woman's right to choose
* LGBTQ equality
* Getting big money out of politics

This is serious. But there's still time for us to fight back. In order to be confirmed, Kavanaugh needs 51 votes in the Senate. We know exactly how Ted Cruz will vote. So we've got to do everything we can to ensure he's not in the Senate when the vote is called.
And right now, thanks to your support, we're within single digits of Cruz -- and putting a stop to a nominee that will impact our country for decades.
[**Rush an urgent donation of $3 to Beto's campaign to take on Ted Cruz. Winning in November is the most direct way that we can stop Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation. But we can only do it with your help.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9200e/3b1d797/7b0342fb/35a9ee06/2707529926/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1807-scotus?refcode=ema180709-scotus&amount=3")
We can't underscore how consequential this new justice will be. Only weeks ago, the Supreme Court issued close rulings on the travel ban, workers' rights, voting rights and a woman's right to choose. And we know that more attacks on our values, on the people of Texas, are coming.
**How do we fight back? Send Beto to the Senate so he can be a voice for the people, not a vote for corporations and special interests.**
[**Give a donation of $3 right now so we can win this race in November and protect everything we care so much about.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9200e/3b1d797/7b0342fb/35a9ee06/2707529926/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1807-scotus?refcode=ema180709-scotus&amount=3")
Thanks for being with us.
Team Beto
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9200e/3b1d797/7b0342fb/35a9ee06/2707529926/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1807-scotus?refcode=ema180709-scotus&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9200e/3b1d797/7b0342fb/35a9ee07/2707529926/VEsC/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9200e/3b1d797/7b0342fb/35a9ee18/2707529926/VEsD/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb9200e/3b1d797/7b0342fb/35a9ee19/2707529926/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: Our justice system
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e0/9e00690/590dde95/2402c4d3/3451664621/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180709_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&source=em18_180709_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx")
Friends,

President Trump just nominated another Supreme Court justice -- and we know the damage they could do to women's health care, workers, and voting rights.

And as we fight this nomination with every tool at our disposal, we need to be aware of a fight right here in Florida. Rick Scott wants to nominate three new Supreme Court justices on his final hours next January, even though a coalition of groups has tried to give our next Governor the ability to choose those judges.

**[I promise that as your next Governor, I'll appoint qualified judges who reflect the diversity of our state -- can you chip in $5 to stand with us in this fight for justice?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37e0/9e00690/590dde95/2402c4d2/3451664621/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-scotus-nominee?gpsid=13_55_1898&refcode=em18_180709_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180709_SCOTUS_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+I+promise+that+as+your+next+Governor+Irs")**

Our campaign isn't just about the next four years -- it's about the next 40 years. We need judges who will help make this state a more equal and compassionate state, instead of letting the special interests run wild.

**[Now is the time for us to stand up for a justice system that works for everyday people -- not the special interests. Thank you,

Andrew

And as we fight this nomination with every tool at our disposal, we need to be aware of a fight right here in Florida. Rick Scott wants to nominate three new Supreme Court justices on his final hours next January, even though a coalition of groups has tried to give our next Governor the ability to choose those judges. "" Our campaign isn't just about the next four years -- it's about the next 40 years. We need judges who will help make this state a more equal and compassionate state, instead of letting the special interests run wild. "" Thank you, Andrew "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 1550 Melvin Street, Tallahassee, FL 32303

Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4a5b1b047ff48dfbb972265a1a6bff8&_e=4DoLL69qz9VhZ89yvzhHed3gBSLDyda48lRsxZwrx0C6KPQ7drMtzr7R3Hl8u86fiVTkk_4gSIhs5hJQTvhqdP83cf5-oQV8iGdNzyYP8EjUiqslnnisjpLYOll9-6iDZHIPv8kv1Mcf9GzNHkqfK5R65j8yeyAsWUGj_q3enNKuRG_EvmWRwLcxEVGzmXyhpibpe-BeiL0MRwfjDY7DHMpSp8f-wPQvA-bRzhF-K7JO-2D5mVDPfJTCSFDp320C7ZEMCgtIOSMupKL0bIU_klIx6H8yLMMjkl_UbdnF0QvTcS5i2D5_GLEz4x6rxght9NIT7wR38LHzSqxeSO2vPus518FhabNadCXQES9AXA-OcXXDD0wNahtpiq-G7ySj) that you care about? So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4a5b1b047ff48dfbb972265a1a6bff8&_e=4DoLL69qz9VhZ89yvzhHed3gBSLDyda48lRsxZwrx0AsRv54eD0_Q5_T7fEDQswAipYbUupqtv2_sFOR4XQs9M6CASPIudlVNxWWzQ_OgtzXP3vltLvs-3LgR4hRLhxKFWEHbqYo7tJWIc76tjdnH14eZjEOX1cOvD3uOR0Ht2Guprggf1uDyRYfXc-QYyaPamfnu19P0XY69e1Az_3WVicjA-b-nudBWE_ywWJAeauE-JoG_TUs54mrujc7DOWKp5ZPMKe3UzdZZ5LtuIf0_bjBSUOFU9JQRMj3o73nOhReghC0Ts3XOeG1RSqDeGbe90nanBNFGsmww5j_jyWbqIqpdbVhZaWdPbvixzjZ3USACYs4xk0sFJcemn03XN2_) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e4a5b1b047ff48dfbb972265a1a6bff8&_e=4DoLL69qz9VhZ89yvzhHed3gBSLDyda48lRsxZwrx0BCmXCoLyDzgMCJNoCuC2cjqGFAcodYPwWfAj1_G4f3W7Jp-uWXBNS8ZkQCzpyq776lSNPs9m88-ebrcEKXfTHYbZ1T-Ioaj4sETXT36-Y_3PgqCHLTNB1nCDNStj-nJvrMO2g4IH9iSD748dnFsKAGGhzzWKYLmObJYGGJ_LG6Ny1R_VIO6MtYsbICjoyZojTZwmZJtWdazHHR-SpLVzwavMYPYGdkuiOf3yp_8nlmBniF9sGkbIV_EghFb3MNZUYyFkQEuK0XvPKBn54QIpWMIdevSNykxY83QOAdXhz6IJKigdrTJmUjL3lrdYpQLzYBUeQdkRD5zJI-g_DTkhWILqKCzWCYvgMoaAvGfMNOCw%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. name: Tina Smith
subject: My response to Trump's Supreme Court nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I wanted you to hear it from me personally first:

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bd05/c1f7015/6bbb8bb7/114207b4/1529453964/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180710_scotus-nominee?source=rtw_20180710PM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=") Friends, I wanted you to hear it from me personally first: I will vote no on Donald Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court, Brett Kavanaugh. **[If you are with me, add your name here and go on the record against his nominee.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bd05/c1f7015/6bbb8bb7/114207b4/1529453964/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180710_scotus-nominee?source=rtw_20180710PM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")** Tonight I joined my fellow Senators, Elizabeth Warren, Cory Booker, and Jeff Merkley, and more to declare that we are united against Trump's extreme and dangerous choice for the Supreme Court. This choice was not made through consensus, with careful reasoning, or taking into account how this appointment will affect the lives of every American -- but from a list of ultra-conservative judges literally handpicked by special interests. **And now the Koch network and its political arm are "prepared to commit seven figures to support a nominee in the mold of Neil Gorsuch."** I will not sit by while our values -- abortion rights, voting rights, workers' rights, reining in corporate interests -- are hijacked by a conservative base desperate to make change not through democracy and the ballot box, but through the judiciary. Because when I talk to the people of Minnesota, they are not trying to take away the rights of women, LGBTQ Americans, or give more power to special interests -- they want someone to balance the scales and rule fairly. I do not believe this process, or the choice Trump has made, does that. And I do not believe the people of Minnesota or this country will be served well by his choice. **Now is the tough part. The margin in the Senate will be very close and we will have to raise our voices and fight harder than we have ever before to win. We will face money, a truckload of pressure, and voices on all sides telling us to back down -- that 's why we need to stand together.** **[Will you stand with me against Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court and say no? Add your name here.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bd05/c1f7015/6bbb8bb7/114207b4/1529453964/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180710_scotus-nominee?source=rtw_20180710PM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")** More soon, Tina **[Add Your Name](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bd05/c1f7015/6bbb8bb7/114207b4/1529453964/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjU1NzgzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_180710_scotus-nominee?source=rtw_20180710PM_em&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=")**

clean_body: I wanted you to hear it from me personally first: | "=" Friends, I wanted you to hear it from me personally first: I will vote no on Donald Trump's nominee for the Supreme Court, Brett Kavanaugh. "=" Tonight I joined my fellow Senators, Elizabeth Warren, Cory Booker, and Jeff Merkley, and more to declare that we are united against Trump's extreme and dangerous choice for the Supreme Court. This choice was not made through consensus, with careful reasoning, or taking into account how this appointment will affect the lives of every American -- but from a list of ultra-conservative judges literally handpicked by special interests. And now the Koch network and its political arm are "prepared to commit seven figures to support a nominee in the mold of Neil Gorsuch." I will not sit by while our values -- abortion rights, voting rights, workers' rights, reining in corporate interests -- are hijacked by a conservative base desperate to make change not through democracy and the ballot box, but through the judiciary. Because when I talk to the people of Minnesota, they are not trying to take away the rights of women, LGBTQ Americans, or give more power to special interests -- they want someone to balance the scales and rule fairly. I do not believe this process, or the choice Trump has made, does that. And I do not believe the people of Minnesota or this country will be served well by his choice. Now is the tough part. The margin in the Senate will be very close and we will have to raise our voices and fight harder than we have ever before to win. We will face money, a truckload of pressure, and voices on all sides telling us to back down -- that 's why we need to stand together. "=" More soon, Tina "="

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: A dangerous Supreme Court pick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
body:
Donald Trump just announced that he will nominate Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.
#
Sisters, Brothers, And Friends -
The establishment would like for you to think that the Supreme Court is an impartial judicial institution whose decisions are above politics. That was perhaps once true, but it is certainly not the case anymore.
Donald Trump just announced that he will nominate Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. Let me be absolutely clear: this nomination is a 100 percent political decision, and one that will have a profoundly negative effect on the lives of working people of this country for decades to come if Brett Kavanaugh is confirmed.
Brett Kavanaugh’s record has made it clear he will use his position on the court to protect corporations at the expense of workers, to allow corporations and the wealthy to buy elections and to undermine voting rights. Further, given the fact that Donald Trump stated repeatedly during the campaign that any nominee of his would vote to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , I have no doubt that is exactly what Brett Kavanaugh will do.
**Simply put, nothing is more important now than doing everything in our power to stop this nomination. I intend to travel to many states around the country in opposition to this nomination. Can I count on you to work with me in this fight?**
**[Please add your name to my petition: We must oppose Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to the Supreme Court. This is critical to protect our democracy, so please sign now.](https://act.berniesanders.com/sign/scotus-nomination?source=em180709-t1-full&t=1&akid=28%2E150750%2EfgAeSy)**
Here is a hard truth: for decades the far right has made it their number one goal to stack the Supreme Court with partisan ideologues. During that time, the current court has made dozens of decisions, many of them by a 5-4 vote, that have harmed women’s rights, the environment and most recently the _Janus_ decision, which was an attack on union rights and the standard of living of American workers.
Further, the Supreme Court has eroded voting rights, upheld Trump’s Muslim ban, and of course, by a 5-4 vote, decided _Citizens United_ , empowering corporations and wealthy Americans to buy elections.
And it is widely suspected that a hyper-partisan Supreme Court, with Trump’s new nominee, would aim its sights directly at overturning _Roe v. Wade_. We can’t let this happen.
Donald Trump’s first nomination, Neil Gorsuch, has quickly become one of the most radical right-wing members of the court. The evidence suggests Brett Kavanaugh could go even further.
The damage Brett Kavanaugh could do won’t just last until the next election. He could serve on the Court for decades, making dangerous decisions for years to come.
Together we must do everything we can to win back the House, the Senate and the presidency to stop further disastrous nominees. But right now, we must do everything we can to stop the nomination of Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.
That starts with you adding your name to our petition.
**[Add your name to our petition to oppose the nomination of Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. Let us protect our democracy.](https://act.berniesanders.com/sign/scotus-nomination?source=em180709-t1-full&t=2&akid=28%2E150750%2EfgAeSy)**
This will be a long fight, and I’m proud to have you with me.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/sign/scotus-nomination?source=em180709-t1-full&t=3&akid=28%2E150750%2EfgAeSy)****
Paid for by Friends of Bernie Sanders
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, [click here to unsubscribe](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=28%2E150750%2EfgAeSy). To support Bernie with a contribution, [click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&akid=28%2E150750%2EfgAeSy).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The anti-choice Supreme Court nominee that we feared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Get ready to fight for our reproductive freedoms.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788d3/2f5ea88d/77f9ff31/2cbc116d/3751326630/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&utm_campaign=roe-scotus-kicker&utm_medium=ema") Friend -- it's just as we'd feared. President Trump has just appointed Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. It's safe to assume he's exactly the extremist conservative, anti-choice justice we should expect from Trump. While we still have hope that the Senate can delay the nomination until the people have a chance to voice their concerns in the 2018 midterms, we have to shore up our defenses. It's time to take the movement to the states. **We must, we can, and we will build on our successes here in Washington to keep our reproductive freedoms nationwide.** **[**But we need your help now, before it's too late. Can you help me build up our pro-choice movement in the states to protect _Roe v. Wade_ , right now?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788d3/2f5ea88d/77f9ff31/2cbc116d/3751326630/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&utm_campaign=roe-scotus-kicker&utm_medium=ema")** | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788d3/2f5ea88d/77f9ff31/2cbc116d/3751326630/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&utm_campaign=roe-scotus-kicker&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Monday, July 9, 2018
Subject: Roe v. Wade [SCOTUS Action]
Friend,
For once, I've got to admit President Trump is right. Did you see this headline?
****_The Wall Street Journal_**** ****"Trump Says Abortion Rights Could Be Decided by States"****
---
Here's why Trump is right: For the first time since _Roe v. Wade_ , we have an anti-choice president and an anti-choice Congress. And with Justice Kennedy's retirement, Trump has promised to nominate an anti-choice justice to the Supreme Court. All three branches of the federal government will be anti-choice.
Friend, this leaves it up to us in the states to stand up for reproductive freedoms before it's too late. If we can't count on the Supreme Court to protect our freedoms, we must strengthen the pro-choice movement in our states.
**[**We're working hard here in Washington state to promote a pro-choice, progressive agenda and show the nation what is possible. Be a part of this work by contributing $5 right now.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788d3/2f5ea88d/77f9ff31/2cbc116d/3751326630/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&utm_campaign=roe-scotus-kicker&utm_medium=ema")**
This is truly a fight for the most basic of rights of every woman in this nation. Trump and his extremist allies in D.C. have launched an unprecedented crusade against a woman's right to choose.
Republicans from state legislatures across the country to Congress and the White House want to ban abortion and restrict access to birth control. And they're one vote on the Senate floor away from controlling the Supreme Court, pushing the door wide open to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and pass extreme anti-choice laws.
This is an important issue to me, friend, and I'm not going to back down. This year's _Reproductive Parity Act_ represents one example of how we're standing up for women here in Washington: We improved health care access for all Washington women and addressed disparities that negatively impacted reproductive health care outcomes for the most vulnerable.
Together, again and again, we're showing why elections matter -- here and nationally. We significantly expanded reproductive health care options at home because YOU turned out to vote for pro-choice leaders. It's a model that we must spread to other states.
**[**With the federal government soon to be aligned against us, we must build on our successes here in Washington to keep our reproductive freedoms nationwide. Can you help me build up our pro-choice movement in the states to protect _Roe v. Wade_ , right now?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788d3/2f5ea88d/77f9ff31/2cbc116d/3751326630/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&utm_campaign=roe-scotus-kicker&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks for acting -- we need everyone to come together now.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd788d3/2f5ea88d/77f9ff31/2cbc116d/3751326630/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-roe-wade?utm_source=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&refcode=ema_2018-07-09_roe-scotus-kicker&utm_campaign=roe-scotus-kicker&utm_medium=ema")

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Breaking: President Trump's SCOTUS pick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Roe v. Wade, money in politics, environmental protections, worker rights, immigrant rights, and more could be decided or made worse by a conservative Supreme Court
#
Friends,
Bad news: President Trump has nominated Judge Brett Kavanaugh to fill Justice Kennedy's seat on the Supreme Court. **It's now more important than ever that we have a political revolution capable of showing up, speaking out -- and stopping it.**
Make no mistake: **our fundamental rights are on the line.** _Roe v. Wade_ , money in politics, environmental protections, worker rights, immigrant rights, and more could be decided or made worse by a conservative Supreme Court -- **unless we organize.** If we can put on enough pressure to stop a confirmation hearing until after the midterm elections, we will have a chance to block Trump's nominee.
[**This is where you matter more than ever. With nearly 600 local groups across the country, a political revolution can hold our senators accountable to us --but only if we have the resources to keep organizing. Can you pitch in $1 right now to help us organize across the country?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa7e/bed43eb/642b2c90/75fd39f9/1779556050/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-scotus?refcode=em180709&noskip=true")
So many of the things we're fighting for -- overturning Citizens United, protecting women's healthcare, workers, immigrants, our environment, and more -- could be put out of reach for decades if Kavanaugh is confirmed to the bench.
[**Pitch in $1 to fuel our organizing efforts and build this grassroots movement to protect progressive values.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7aa7e/bed43eb/642b2c90/75fd39f9/1779556050/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-scotus?refcode=em180709&noskip=true")
Thanks for everything that you do.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

name: Frank Schultz, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: Did you hear the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Friend,

President Donald Trump has nominated Judge Brett Kavanaugh to fill Justice Anthony Kennedy's Supreme Court seat.

Now that we have a name, we can confirm what we already knew: civil, voting, reproductive, LGBTQ, and immigration rights are all on the chopping block if Trump gets his way.

Senator Bob Menendez isn't going to stand for it, and neither should you. We need every single voice to step up and say "NO" to this nominee, right now.

[**Ready to fight back against this blatant attempt to stack the Supreme Court with right-wing justices? Add your name to join Bob Menendez in rejecting Judge Brett Kavanaugh now.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c9c/3af3c5d/3b6ae308/4ec387cf/305242563/VEsH/ "https://menendez.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-fight-back-against-trump-s-extreme-supreme-court-nomination?gpsid=5_73_1915&refcode=em18_180709_SCOTUS_engg_gq_cust_KAV__ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180709_SCOTUS_engg_gq_cust_KAV__ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+Ready+to+fight+back+against+this+blatant")

We cannot allow Trump to play politics with the Supreme Court - especially when so much is on the line.

It's clear that a vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh is a vote to make abortion illegal, end protections for patients with pre-existing conditions, and further rig our justice system in favor of rich and powerful corporate interests.

Bob Menendez will stand with the people of New Jersey and oppose Kavanaugh. Will Bob Hugin do the same, or will he keep siding with Trump, McConnell, and the far-right?

[**If you agree we can 't allow Trump to stack the Supreme Court with another loyal extremist, add your name and then tell Bob Hugin to add his too.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846c9c/3af3c5d/3b6ae308/4ec387ce/305242563/VEsE/ "https://menendez.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-fight-back-against-trump-s-extreme-supreme-court-nomination?gpsid=5_73_1915&refcode=em18_180709_SCOTUS_engg_gq_cust_KAV__ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180709_SCOTUS_engg_gq_cust_KAV__ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+If+you+agree+we+canrsquot+allow+Trump+to")

Thank you,

Frank

Frank Schultz
Campaign Manager
Menendez for Senate

clean_body: Friend, President Donald Trump has nominated Judge Brett Kavanaugh to fill Justice Anthony Kennedy's Supreme Court seat. Now that we have a name, we can confirm what we already knew: civil, voting, reproductive, LGBTQ, and immigration rights are all on the chopping block if Trump gets his way. Senator Bob Menendez isn't going to stand for it, and neither should you. We need every single voice to step up and say "NO" to this nominee, right now. "" We cannot allow Trump to play politics with the Supreme Court - especially when so much is on the line. It's clear that a vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh is a vote to make abortion illegal, end protections for patients with pre-existing conditions, and further rig our justice system in favor of rich and powerful corporate interests. Bob Menendez will stand with the people of New Jersey and oppose Kavanaugh. Will Bob Hugin do the same, or will he keep siding with Trump, McConnell, and the far-right? "" Thank you, Frank Frank Schultz Campaign Manager Menendez for Senate "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. "" ""

subject: Brett Kavanaugh is anti-choice

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4365/24c69fd9/1866652b4/1882ee53/4198539072/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES17N_digital_email_20180709_SCOTUSNominee_inact&source=WQEFES17N_digital_email_20180709_SCOTUSNominee_inact")

Peter,

President Trump just announced his Supreme Court nominee: Brett Kavanaugh.

Trump promised to only nominate anti-choice Supreme Court justices, and now he's kept that promise.

Kavanaugh helped issue a block to keep an undocumented teenager from getting an abortion and dissented when the block was overturned.

If confirmed to the highest court in the country, Kavanaugh could vote to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ -- presenting a grave threat to reproductive freedom.

That's why it's critical that we help elect **Jacky Rosen** (NV) and **Kyrsten Sinema**(AZ), our two Senate challengers, and re-elect all 10 of our Senate women so Democrats have approval over Trump's nominees.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to flip the Senate and protect choice:**

Stephanie Schriock

body:
Great news - today, President Trump nominated Judge Brett Kavanaugh to serve as our next Supreme Court Justice. Judge Brett Kavanaugh is... [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c8382e37ec884efdafb3b24341d0d96b&_e=_l-wiSbN2MvUm5Jh9mb5OM39E1T6Y2pTLlO2vw-BbkMh-E6wfYjcKE4yLRO2quZTdYDzdkpi86jaoCbrn8ftqZTvlnOTHBqyUlQWk0JnKlpMTyvwoE5fd-tk1-21CYgeNfzkWK1wMoJTRyaln_hw1RP2wk159nv9vynkgzigEv5dwJrkDmkPw3N1eVWdkD3NKFRNnEcNHBkdhjmtm6fzyFYzacqbbvMdDmPgF2v0P66jayfHohyz6KQ6Tir5rceTV9fEWj9L-PiC2IBNqnFKpoRQNTlz4_uwcCIveWc3lAp0JrXCUXUyFMzL1Gj4IAEjT9tFQf_jgWdd6Pr_nFIXW2aJmSAac1nVJyGycwlh0wTBRd8nJrzJymM6fqfDgOaWYujaoE5R5Ht2y1Hs3cYJASTZ8CCzFDMGOcUTSJlTp4U%3D) | |

Great news - today, President Trump nominated Judge Brett Kavanaugh to serve as our next Supreme Court Justice.

Judge Brett Kavanaugh is brilliant, honorable, and devoted to the Constitution. I proudly stand with President Trump and with Judge Brett Kavanaugh.

**The President has made a strong choice with the nomination of Judge Brett Kavanaugh. And now we need to stand with his nominee and send a strong message to Democrats: you will not obstruct this appointment.**

Senate Democrats will fight tooth and nail against Judge Brett Kavanaugh. Not because he isn’t well-qualified - he is. Not because he has the wrong temperament - he has an impeccable record. They’ll fight simply because Judge Brett Kavanaugh is “President Trump’s pick.”

That’s unacceptable. Judge Brett Kavanaugh is a great nominee, and we need him on the Supreme Court now.
**[Join me in sending a message to Democrats: the American people stand with Judge Brett Kavanaugh. Don’t obstruct President Trump’s nominee.](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=c8382e37ec884efdafb3b24341d0d96b&_e=_l-wiSbN2MvUm5Jh9mb5OM39E1T6Y2pTLlO2vw-BbkMh-E6wfYjcKE4yLRO2quZTdYDzdkpi86jaoCbrn8ftqZTvlnOTHBqyUlQWk0JnKlpMTyvwoE5fd-tk1-21CYgeNfzkWK1wMoJTRyaln_hw1RP2wk159nv9vynkgzigEv5dwJrkDmkPw3N1eVWdkD3NKFRNnEcNHBkdhjmtm6fzyJSd2cOA5xYdkHTPR0Vxg8B-iKuTTxfZyxVZsEjOzC9KkIG2MRt5kZfkhbmeFTmTenDdSEKyEabYpyV7K-NDzTW51NcTn3MOXxJot_RBKlJpWeajqf79hVCmKyFrcNb5gHdaLjvVIyRmwERR0CB_rEzpxaLYV2x9Hg2UTk8mJfGdnmH3f177heFonUluJKvd2d5O2iEQwNfY-Cwxjn-co7Y%3D)**

I'm Ready to Serve Again,
Greg Pence

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: Weaponization comes to the West Wing?
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this email, view it online.

Hi Supporter,

Have you heard about Henry Kerner?

In May 2017, Mr. Kerner was appointed by
President Trump to lead the Office of Special Counsel.

But just a few years earlier, as staff
director for Sen. John McCain, Kerner was tasked with containing
the pro-liberty movement. So, he called the IRS.

Newly released transcripts from his 2013
meetings with the IRS quote Mr. Kerner pushing the IRS to "audit
so many that it is financially ruinous".

Mr. Kerner openly conspired to weaponize the
government against American citizens. He destroyed lives. He
should be perp-walked out of the West Wing.

True the Vote has been fighting
IRS-weaponization since 2010 - and the fight continues to this
day.

Our pursuit of election integrity is what
keeps us on the radars of politicos like Kerner. When citizens
are informed and empowered they can take down corrupt political
machines.

That's why, as courtroom-weary as we are, we
must continue to press on. For election integrity. For free
speech. For truth. We've pared down our staff and support to a
skeleton crew, but our work is ongoing, in ways seen and unseen.

So, I ask you for two things; first, let
President Trump Know that Henry Kerner must go, and second, stay
standing for election integrity. Volunteer to work in the
polls, encourage your candidates to rally volunteers to help
ensure the 2018 elections are free and fair - and let them know,
we're here to help.

We're all in this together - and working
together, we really can True the Vote.

Onward-

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder
True the Vote

PS Kudos to the great work of Judicial Watch
for unearthing the Kerner transcripts. To read the full report,
click here.

Office

713.401.3550

Mail

P.O. Box
131768
Houston,
TX 77219-1768

Email

info@truethevote.org

Web

www.truethevote.org

True the Vote is a 501(c)(3)
nonprofit organization, Federal Tax I.D. #27-2860095.
Donations are tax-deductible to
the extent allowed by law.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: MY CHOICE FOR SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It’s time to defend him. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4d605163bf59ce257394f6cbfb302a2b789fe0b06fd03db77733cc5a5c8ded9b3763cbca8f70da6a5832f5a10b4a5ff78a1789534156ff29)
---

Friend,

I promised you I would only appoint justices in the mold of the late, great Justice Antonin Scalia.

Last night, I once again fulfilled that promise by appointing a strong constitutionalist, the Honorable Brett M. Kavanaugh, to the Supreme Court.

Judge Kavanaugh will protect our religious liberties, uphold the rule of law, and interpret the Constitution as it was originally understood by our Founders.

Senate liberals know that we have the opportunity to reshape the Supreme Court for an entire GENERATION, and they are ready to obstruct and unleash a smear campaign against our nominee.

**Just like during Justice Gorsuch 's confirmation hearings, we need to remind Democrats to stop playing politics and to put America FIRST.

body:

Peter,

Kansas voters only have 7 days before they face another important deadline of this election cycle: primary voter registration.

**If you want to vote in the August 7 primary, you must be registered or update your registration before close-of-business next Tuesday, July 17.[Click here to register or make sure your registration is up to date!](https://act.myngp.com/el/qonOmMCkmMu_ipvd-URF6-Fw0lT3ZiHpmMSdLQZJE3k=/L33q2DPnhEhL20JQcYuGXph_U-eBZ2ifl_gBIIa3Z-k=)**

The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy -- but across the country, officials like Kris Kobach are trying to stifle the right to vote by implementing unreasonable, restrictive voting laws. The best way to fight back is to vote, though -- and there's way too much at stake this November to sit this primary out.

You can register in person at your county election office, at the Secretary of State's office, or online, so there's no excuse not to. **[Just click here to register or check your registration status -- then remind your neighbors, friends and family members to do the same!](https://act.myngp.com/el/qonOmMCkmMu_ipvd-URF6-Fw0lT3ZiHpmMSdLQZJE3k=/L33q2DPnhEhL20JQcYuGXph_U-eBZ2ifl_gBIIa3Z-k=)**

Thank you,

Team Davis

Contributions or gifts are not tax deductible. Contributions from foreign nationals and corporations are prohibited. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Sign our petition opposing Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court
body:
Activist -

Had it not been for the landmark Brown v. Board of Education, I likely would not have become a lawyer, or a prosecutor, or been elected district attorney, or the Attorney General of California. And I certainly would not have been a United States Senator.

As part of only the second class to integrate the Berkeley public schools, I know from firsthand experience how consequential an individual justice on the Supreme Court can be to the lives of Americans.

When at its best, the Supreme Court has advanced the cause of justice and enforced the principle of equality; at its worst, it has upheld racial segregation, voter suppression, and the right of corporations to flood dark money into elections.

Brett Kavanaugh represents a fundamental threat to the promise of justice and equality, which is why I am announcing that I will oppose his nomination to the Supreme Court.

Sign my urgent petition opposing Brett Kavanaugh, Trump’s nominee to the Supreme Court. As a replacement to Justice Kennedy, he presents an existential threat to our rights and to the health care of millions of Americans. (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/acquisition-180710-supreme-court-dems/?source=ads_dems_180710_all_ad1)

Sign the petition (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/acquisition-180710-supreme-court-dems/?source=ads_dems_180710_all_ad1) Trump made clear during the 2016 presidential campaign that he’d create a litmus test for Supreme Court Justices — overturn Roe v. Wade and rule against the Affordable Care Act.

Judge Kavanaugh makes good on that promise. As recently as last year, he disregarded Supreme Court precedent on Roe and opposed the reproductive health care rights of a vulnerable young woman — in a ruling that was overturned by a sitting of all judges on his court.

The health of women and the rights of all Americans are on the line in this Supreme Court fight. Numerous cases involving women’s health are only one step away from the Supreme Court. Those are the stakes of this nomination and we must demand a mainstream jurist worthy of our country.

Add your name to my petition opposing Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to the Supreme Court. He is too extreme and will shift the balance of the court for a generation. (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/acquisition-180710-supreme-court-dems/?source=ads_dems_180710_all_ad1)

Sign the petition (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/acquisition-180710-supreme-court-dems/?source=ads_dems_180710_all_ad1) Not a single one of us can afford to sit on the sidelines if we’re going to win this fight.

Thanks for taking action.

— Kamala

Sign the petition (https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/acquisition-180710-supreme-court-dems/?source=ads_dems_180710_all_ad1)
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMzQ4LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjIxNTg5Nzcx

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

name: Mike Siegel
subject: 119 days – to build, to dream, to fight for our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS [https://www
body:
http://www.siegelfortexas.org [http://www.siegelfortexas.org]
Dear Peter,
Faith will carry us to victory. Faith in ourselves, in our brothers and sisters, in our neighbors and friends. Faith in democracy. Faith in humanity. Faith that if we walk the right path, do the work, keep open minds and hearts, we will prevail.
You don't need me to tell you that last night the President sent in motion a Supreme Court nominee who may hinder the cause of democracy for decades to come. Every law and right we depend on appears to be at risk. The right to marry; the right to organize; protections for clean air and water; health care; voting rights; reproductive choice.
I am heartened by the growing efforts [https://savescotus.indivisible.org] to convince U.S. Senators to vote against Judge Kavanaugh's appointment. And I am thankful for the opportunity, in the 119 days between now and Election Day, to work towards a Congress that can write stronger laws that protect every community in this country.
As always, there is opportunity in crisis. Between Trump's policies and the potential new Supreme Court majority, Republicans are going against the vast majority of the American people. Sixty-nine percent [https://www.reproductiverights.org/press-room/new-poll-from-the-center-for-reproductive-rights-6-in-10-americans-support-federal-law-to] of Americans support Roe v. Wade [http://www.reproductiverights.org/press-room/new-poll-from-the-center-for-reproductive-rights-6-in-10-americans-support-federal-law-to] . Eighty-six percent support the Dreamers [https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/survey-finds-strong-support-for-dreamers/2017/09/24/df3c885c-a16f-11e7-b14f-f41773cd5a14_story.html?utm_term=.e8b3354619a7] . Sixty-one percent support labor unions [https://news.gallup.com/poll/217331/labor-union-approval-best-2003.aspx] . Seventy-four percent support strong environmental protections [http://www.pewresearch.org/fact-tank/2017/04/20/for-earth-day-heres-how-americans-view-environmental-issues/] .
Our side is the overwhelming majority . We know, due to many factors, that the majority does not always determine the outcome. But if we dig deep, if we commit ourselves to this democratic project of having the people decide what government we want, victory is within reach.
119 days until Election Day. We have our ups and our downs, but our path is clear. Millions of us must join together to determine the country we want to see.
Yours in struggle,
Mike

Austin, TX 78701

| | Friends,

We are officially one week away from the July 17th runoff election! I wanted to make sure you saw my latest TV ad highlighting two numbers I believe voters should know before they make their decision at the polls: 70% and 97%.

As the TV ad states, **Democrat Bobby Bright voted with Nancy Pelosi 70% of the time** while he represented our district in Congress. On the other hand, **I have proudly voted with the Trump Administration in favor of our shared conservative values 97% of the time.**

Throughout this campaign, I have run on my record as a conservative Republican, and I will always fight for our shared values.

** Make sure you get out to vote next Tuesday, July 17!** I would be honored to have your support at the polls as we continue our efforts to deliver results for the conservative cause.

Watch and share Team Roby's latest TV ad [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=112A134A9A3779).

name: The White House
subject: What to know about Judge Brett Kavanaugh
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=88d9cd672203009b2e9ce445d3d48084d7022da0a13b97c81b10239399fc0d9e769fe7c83cf373beba4130fc01488a4eaf470fa871581733) The White House • July 10, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump arrives in Brussels, Belgium, to prepare for a meeting with America’s NATO allies. [Learn more about the NATO commitment.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=88d9cd672203009b0cc14e06d01b753af9110625c8b2a26868e250329787b24960b3904dcc84e287472b40794a664dc9f83afa0eac829528) |
---
|

## What to know about Judge Brett Kavanaugh
**“A judge’s job** is to interpret the law, not to make the law or make policy,” writes Judge Brett Kavanaugh, President Trump’s nominee to succeed Justice Anthony Kennedy on the Supreme Court. “Don’t make up new constitutional rights that are not in the text of the Constitution. Don’t shy away from enforcing constitutional rights that are in the text.”
**Judge Kavanaugh has served** on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit since 2006, authoring more than 300 opinions--including 11 that have been affirmed by the Supreme Court. A graduate of Yale College and Yale Law School, Judge Kavanaugh has clerked on the Supreme Court and on the Third and Ninth Circuit Courts of Appeals.
**“In keeping with President Reagan’s legacy** , I do not ask about a nominee’s personal opinions,” President Trump said last night. “What matters is not a judge’s political views, but whether they can set aside those views to do what the law and the Constitution require. I am pleased to say that I have found, without doubt, such a person.”
[Learn why Judge Kavanaugh is President Trump’s choice for the Supreme Court. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=88d9cd672203009b5b11154b31bf76bc5d685dbabc3c78e7f7e957e90ddcf7a266fb24cb58a5a32df138e00ebc3535784add651fcc880549)
**Watch** : [President Trump announces his nominee from the White House. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=88d9cd672203009b35a66c99b5cc6bcd4ce669b610e45d19b6f26a7366a6daa8760103488a1a5b41a3fa3c6f10ac069cd87c5a9ee1e2dd04)

---
|

## ‘A beautiful moment’ in Thailand
**The world received good news from Thailand this morning**. After being stranded in a cave for more than two weeks, 12 young boys and their soccer coach were successfully rescued in a difficult mission. “On behalf of the United States, congratulations to the Thai Navy SEALs and all on the successful rescue,” President Trump tweeted.
**American personnel helped** stage equipment, prepared the first three chambers of the cave system for safe passage, assisted in transporting the soccer team evacuees through the cave system, and are providing medical personnel and other technical assistance as needed. U.S. coordination with the Thai military, Thai government, and other entities was extremely positive and effective, according to Department of Defense officials.
[Read President Trump’s tweet: “Such a beautiful moment.” ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=88d9cd672203009b7cd7e1a7ac96d10d99b02f05cf02630a2507e52fa92a47a1f0f4dab1db1248c4794cf6edc1e57376ff4332b0b9264adf)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen
**President Donald J. Trump nominates Judge Brett M. Kavanaugh for the United States Supreme Court** | July 9, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=88d9cd672203009b460d8ee81b2d688d7b776dbc66ef35e137ed9f30dd77d9a9314b89f07eaddf1534f7d363368f2846d8fdc97c1d6265c6) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=88d9cd672203009b510fc4bcf423582b6bae62781a0525b3a3999eb8d7b9042f9295a4d9654754e81f837e7c528144ea9da3f5e93cb79120) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d47cf13a3ebbaf61564810b977303e7e327c932078324eb1a27179c48bc8ce92571923acf43d1e8224aa9d5f28f286fb52b7fce15020b41777)
---

Trump arrives in Brussels, Belgium, to prepare for a meeting with America’s NATO allies. | | What to know about Judge Brett Kavanaugh “A judge’s job is to interpret the law, not to make the law or make policy,” writes Judge Brett Kavanaugh, President Trump’s nominee to succeed Justice Anthony Kennedy on the Supreme Court. “Don’t make up new constitutional rights that are not in the text of the Constitution. Don’t shy away from enforcing constitutional rights that are in the text.” Judge Kavanaugh has served on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit since 2006, authoring more than 300 opinions--including 11 that have been affirmed by the Supreme Court. A graduate of Yale College and Yale Law School, Judge Kavanaugh has clerked on the Supreme Court and on the Third and Ninth Circuit Courts of Appeals. “In keeping with President Reagan’s legacy , I do not ask about a nominee’s personal opinions,” President Trump said last night. “What matters is not a judge’s political views, but whether they can set aside those views to do what the law and the Constitution require. I am pleased to say that I have found, without doubt, such a person.” Watch : | ‘A beautiful moment’ in Thailand The world received good news from Thailand this morning. After being stranded in a cave for more than two weeks, 12 young boys and their soccer coach were successfully rescued in a difficult mission. “On behalf of the United States, congratulations to the Thai Navy SEALs and all on the successful rescue,” President Trump tweeted. American personnel helped stage equipment, prepared the first three chambers of the cave system for safe passage, assisted in transporting the soccer team evacuees through the cave system, and are providing medical personnel and other technical assistance as needed. U.S. coordination with the Thai military, Thai government, and other entities was extremely positive and effective, according to Department of Defense officials. | Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen President Donald J. Trump nominates Judge Brett M. Kavanaugh for the United States Supreme Court | July 9, 2018 | |

name: Thompson HQ
subject: FWD: your response needed | re: Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
**Trump 's nomination of Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court means that our fundamental rights are on the line.**

Did you see Mike's message Peter? We're waiting for your response:

Mike's previous email:

**\---------- Forwarded message ---------**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pg1IAzWBwbMI7iSlLKC5ZrAK23NgX3bawgX__CTvrT4=/qa8YaOHWJzl2hMnWQqI-Qmz8OrAM1CQ-J3tuKNzL0Gg=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_WL_180710_1_2&amount=20&recurring=true)

Peter, last week's news of Kennedy retiring shocked us all. Now with Kennedy gone, Trump has the power to appoint a justice -- giving us the first conservative-leaning Court in decades.

This means that the issues that matter to us -- like the decision of _Roe v. Wade_ , campaign finance reform, and even gay marriage -- are under a conservative threat.

Just two years ago, Mitch McConnell said the American people should have a voice when it came to appointing Merrick Garland. McConnell believed then that justices should wait to be appointed until after the elections. So, shouldn't we follow that same philosophy now?

| **Peter, we want to hear from you. Do you believe we should wait until after the midterm elections for President Trump to appoint a judge?** | [YES](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pg1IAzWBwbMI7iSlLKC5ZrAK23NgX3bawgX__CTvrT4=/qa8YaOHWJzl2hMnWQqI-Qmz8OrAM1CQ-J3tuKNzL0Gg=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_WL_180710_1_2_YES&amount=20&recurring=true) | [NO](https://act.myngp.com/el/Pg1IAzWBwbMI7iSlLKC5ZrAK23NgX3bawgX__CTvrT4=/qa8YaOHWJzl2hMnWQqI-Qmz8OrAM1CQ-J3tuKNzL0Gg=?refcode=MT_EM_SV_WL_180710_1_2_NO&amount=20&recurring=true)
---|---

Thank you,

Mike

name: Marcy Kaptur and Tim Ryan
subject: Stand up against the Supreme Court's anti-worker decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P
body:
Take action to support unions and workers! | | | Folks, Two weeks ago, the Supreme Court ruled 5-4 to devastate funding for the unions that represent teachers, police officers, fire fighters and other city and state employees.
This is a result that corporate interests and right-wing billionaires have sought for decades. They know that workers banding together in their collective interest are at the core of the movement for economic justice -- that they are one of the last lines of defense against unbridled corporate greed. **
** **Collective bargaining has always helped to set the standard by which ALL workplaces operate. That's why the ruling in Janus v. AFSCME doesn't just hurt members of unions -- it hurts ALL of us.**
[We're not backing down. As proud supporters of American teachers, first responders, and all public employees, we stand firmly on the side of workers against this latest attack. Sign on to join us:](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2j1/pfyKVBdeQqa-A_HcI_LCaQ/h0/7G9KUAvREMu2r-2BwXmOJAeUEp9KfGGpwGfCVklIAvc-2FjosogjJIrdXsM-2BGnKHKlODAaDxu1AbxSTpdIZp8J1eylpIMbVEaEv9Ka6ACeszgDpAaGdxES7i1CogNl0UtpGOv8-2F8SSbcVoyD0oma8ubCryqYhpXb02d5Ifsn0Tvy-2F5QbgX62pYyBGCZlCVkBX7t2X988v40o0hnc6CF3lQm-2Bmop-2BzQCJo-2FrJwzh8uWlDQAg12Xov6ijLU5wZyH-2FKHxlzjm-2F2lSGiOmpa3RsawovERxWZGOa4fQwKLTeScB3BhVHhiPoBwpyq1S7DabZREc1r)

# [Add your name →](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2j1/pfyKVBdeQqa-A_HcI_LCaQ/h1/7G9KUAvREMu2r-2BwXmOJAeUEp9KfGGpwGfCVklIAvc-2FjosogjJIrdXsM-2BGnKHKlODAaDxu1AbxSTpdIZp8J1eylpIMbVEaEv9Ka6ACeszgDpAaGdxES7i1CogNl0UtpGOM06oORM-2F3ZyADNOEE-2F-2BmRw9PSqNgmcL5OxzpsgAt7x5WgiOdJPmdA-2F5-2B6dohGKAUhMn6ADreo36-2Bm7N-2B0y7pe6u53o0jQrG464Nv1j8ygtSdjbfdJSajhjaHrg5-2BByniYA94tYFt3gNrOmJsRDf7wlvR2LhSXO-2BObo4HVNGDhb-2BY4TLJGuNeTTZo7KcJCzBY)
**
** **Don't listen to the spin. This decision wasn't about "free speech" -- it was about busting unions and working people.** How do we know? Because the billionaires and corporate interests behind the case have openly admitted it. The State Policy Network (SPN), a nationwide network of billionaire-backed right-wing think tanks, told donors one of its main goals was to "defund and defang" unions, according to _The Guardian_ _._

Early this year, _The Washington Post_ reported that the Koch Brothers, flush with cash from the Trump tax cut, had pledged to spend $400 million to "break" teachers unions.

There's no doubt that billionaires like Donald Trump, Betsy DeVos, and the Koch Brothers are jumping for joy at this decision. The best way to take the wind out of their sails is to send a clear message -- whether you're in a union or not, we all stand together for stronger workers' rights...and AGAINST the well-funded forces that want to pull us apart.
**
Now with Trump's new Supreme Court pick potentially shifting the balance of the court further out of the mainstream, it is more important than ever that you stand up and take action.** **[Add your name to stand with workers now >>](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/3AA/ni0YAA/t.2j1/pfyKVBdeQqa-A_HcI_LCaQ/h2/7G9KUAvREMu2r-2BwXmOJAeUEp9KfGGpwGfCVklIAvc-2FjosogjJIrdXsM-2BGnKHKlODAaDxu1AbxSTpdIZp8J1eylpIMbVEaEv9Ka6ACeszgDpAaGdxES7i1CogNl0UtpGOkj-2BKga-2BsmsZ5XTExBv5a-2FljsVXXK0yXpnE8ZgTWPfa6HnxE5-2B8ALuRG7R-2FhDLXMBnHJMF3PWemZNp2hwSBr7IoAu0VZQ-2FSNQK6ftuqMhdXyF2NqCLnT5juCIY4MCaJ-2BUhRRb41A27yodQWktzJCoUyOWks2P0vOWb-2Fjn7lEl03rd-2FfH-2FJ4dWA1JuQ0fdpKYr)**
Thank you for your support,
\-- Congressman Tim Ryan and Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur

clean_body: Take action to support unions and workers! | | | Folks, Two weeks ago, the Supreme Court ruled 5-4 to devastate funding for the unions that represent teachers, police officers, fire fighters and other city and state employees. This is a result that corporate interests and right-wing billionaires have sought for decades. They know that workers banding together in their collective interest are at the core of the movement for economic justice -- that they are one of the last lines of defense against unbridled corporate greed. Collective bargaining has always helped to set the standard by which ALL workplaces operate. That's why the ruling in Janus v. AFSCME doesn't just hurt members of unions -- it hurts ALL of us. Don't listen to the spin. This decision wasn't about "free speech" -- it was about busting unions and working people. How do we know? Because the billionaires and corporate interests behind the case have openly admitted it. The State Policy Network (SPN), a nationwide network of billionaire-backed right-wing think tanks, told donors one of its main goals was to "defund and defang" unions, according to The Guardian . Early this year, The Washington Post reported that the Koch Brothers, flush with cash from the Trump tax cut, had pledged to spend $400 million to "break" teachers unions. There's no doubt that billionaires like Donald Trump, Betsy DeVos, and the Koch Brothers are jumping for joy at this decision. The best way to take the wind out of their sails is to send a clear message -- whether you're in a union or not, we all stand together for stronger workers' rights...and AGAINST the well-funded forces that want to pull us apart. Now with Trump's new Supreme Court pick potentially shifting the balance of the court further out of the mainstream, it is more important than ever that you stand up and take action. Thank you for your support, \-- Congressman Tim Ryan and Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur marcykaptur.com Paid for by Kaptur for Congress P.O. Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Marcy Kaptur for Congress, please .

body:
You better believe that with Brett Kavanaugh on the bench, Roe v. Wade, affordable health care, labor unions, and civil rights will all be on the chopping block.
---
Last night, Donald Trump announced Brett Kavanaugh as his nominee for the Supreme Court. Let's get one thing straight, Derek:

Already this year, the conservative majority on the Supreme Court sanctioned attacks on workers' rights, further threatened a woman's right to choose, upheld the discriminatory Muslim ban, and supported voter suppression efforts in Ohio -- and that was before Justice Kennedy stepped down. **So you better believe that with Brett Kavanaugh on the bench,_Roe v. Wade_ , affordable health care, labor unions, and civil rights will all be on the chopping block.**

Regaining a Democratic majority in the Senate is the best way to keep Trump from appointing more far-right conservatives to the Supreme Court. There's never been a more important time to show you stand with Democrats.

**Make a $3 contribution to help take back the Senate and elect Democrats who will fight for the fundamental rights of all Americans:**

[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052105c/4067b0a/67426b68f/7fb36ed8/1466605929/VEsEDA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-nomination?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=29+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180710_tp_30&source=em_20180710_tp_30&refcode=em_20180710_tp_30")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052105c/4067b0a/67426b68f/7fb36ed9/1466605929/VEsFBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-nomination?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=30+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180710_tp_30&source=em_20180710_tp_30&refcode=em_20180710_tp_30")
** Perhaps the most detrimental and enduring part of Trump's legacy will be the conservative extremists he appoints to our federal courts. They will be around long after Trump's presidency ends -- and they have the potential to shape our country's future for generations to come.

Brett Kavanaugh's nomination is an attack on our values, Derek. Unless we come together right now to help Democrats take back the Senate, Trump will continue stacking our courts with far-right conservatives. If you're in this fight, today is a critical time to show it.

**[Chip in $3 to help Democrats regain a majority in the Senate this November. The only way it will be possible is if we work together -- starting right now.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052105c/4067b0a/67426b68f/7fb36ee6/1466605929/VEsFBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-nomination?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=31+-+Chip+in++if+consinConsGroup29422+another&utm_campaign=em_20180710_tp_30&source=em_20180710_tp_30&refcode=em_20180710_tp_30")**

Thanks for showing you stand with Democrats.

Tom

name: Molly Kelly
subject: Can you take a moment?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Supporters of Molly Kelly
body:
| | |
---
Friends,
I grew up in a big family, the second of 11 kids. I learned an important lesson: If one of us is to succeed, then all of us must succeed. This philosophy has guided my career serving the people of New Hampshire and will guide me as your governor.
Today, our current governor puts the interests of wealthy corporations ahead of children and families. That's wrong. As governor, I'll work day in and day out to make sure I'm fighting for what matters to you and your family.
I've been talking to folks across the Granite State about their priorities. **I want to make sure no one gets left behind, so I'd love for you to take a moment right now to tell me what's on your mind:**
| | [Share Your Thoughts](https://mollykelly.bsd. "https://surveys.signforgood.com/kelly-July-priorities?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk71-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fkellyforgovernoremails%3Frefcode%3Djtk71-su-nd")
---
Thanks so much,

Molly

name: Jasper Logan
subject: You can help Austin win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Friend --

With less than a month left until the primary, it is absolutely vital that we inform Missouri voters about Austin Petersen and his message of liberty. But we can't do it alone, we need your help calling voters. Even if you can only commit 15 minutes a day, it would be a tremendous help to the campaign. You don't have to be a Missouri Resident or make time to come in to the office, anyone with a computer can phonebank from the comfort of their own home from anywhere in the country. If you would like to help Austin win this US Senate race, we NEED you to sign up at www.austinpetersen.com/volunteer as soon as possible. We will contact you shortly with your login information and training videos, and we will be available to answer any questions you may have.

Thank you so much for your support, Friend. Please sign up to volunteer ASAP!

Have a wonderful day,
Jasper P. Logan
Volunteer Recruitment & Training
Austin Petersen for US Senate

Donald Trump has made it clear that he wants a Supreme Court Justice who would overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and roll back women's rights.

Tom Wolf has fought at every turn to protect and expand women's rights:
* He vetoed the most anti-choice bill in the country -- a bill that would have outlawed abortion, even in cases of rape or incest, and severely limited access to reproductive healthcare options for women,
* He's opposed Harrisburg Republicans' efforts to defund Planned Parenthood,
* And he opposed Donald Trump's plan to institute a gag rule that would block women from life saving health care services.

Tom Wolf and democratic governors are the last line of defense against Donald Trump and an anti-choice Supreme Court.

We need to stand with Tom Wolf and show Donald Trump and anti-choice Republicans that we won't back down from this fight.

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Peter, you haven't chipped in yet → can you make your first donation?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Reaching this goal will send a strong message about the strength of our campaign.
#
Peter -
Over the weekend, Zephyr set an ambitious goal for our campaign: **10,000 individual donations before this week 's fundraising deadline.**
After this deadline, we'll publicly report our fundraising numbers. Reaching this goal will send a strong message about the strength of our campaign. But that means we need you to help us keep up the pace:
**[Can you make a $3 donation right now? Our opponents are taking corporate cash, but our campaign is funded 100% by the people. We quite literally cannot do it without you.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb1/6e822e2f/1bd0aea1/41727e3c/2682587595/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTAtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180710-1-full")**
**Official Fundraising Deadline Drive**
**Name: **Peter
**Supporter ID:** 244410
**Previous Donor:** No, not yet!
**Suggested Donation:[$3.00](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb1/6e822e2f/1bd0aea1/41727e3c/2682587595/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTAtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180710-1-full")**

We would not ask if it were not important, so thank you for making a contribution today.
\- Team Zephyr

name: Mel Hall
subject: I need 3 minutes of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friends, I need just three minutes of your time.

I've reached out to you recently about all the work we're doing to get the campaign ready for our push over the summer and into the fall. That work begins and ends with you. I'm spending my time right now listening to the needs of Hoosier families, and I want your input.

[**Take our 2nd District survey, and tell me how I can best serve you as your next Congressperson.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1-ZgHe_KEwxpABcGBoUS_Vd8Pb6JcAyddd_lmyhKP8=/do17PtRKmAqAbyb9qd2PAgy_K_yX0WzJhQzBhmcfTbk=)

It's been pretty hot these past few weeks, but that hasn't stopped our volunteers and me from criss-crossing the district, speaking to voters, and talking about our plans to bring accountability and transparency to Washington.

But it isn't enough. I want to know which local and national issues are of most concern to you, so I can make sure to represent your interests when we win in November.

[**It takes just three minutes to make your voice heard. Fill out our 2nd District survey today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/W1-ZgHe_KEwxpABcGBoUS_Vd8Pb6JcAyddd_lmyhKP8=/do17PtRKmAqAbyb9qd2PAgy_K_yX0WzJhQzBhmcfTbk=)

Thank you,

Mel

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
---

P.O. Box 862
South Bend, IN 46624 United States

clean_body: Friends, I need just three minutes of your time. I've reached out to you recently about all the work we're doing to get the campaign ready for our push over the summer and into the fall. That work begins and ends with you. I'm spending my time right now listening to the needs of Hoosier families, and I want your input. = It's been pretty hot these past few weeks, but that hasn't stopped our volunteers and me from criss-crossing the district, speaking to voters, and talking about our plans to bring accountability and transparency to Washington. But it isn't enough. I want to know which local and national issues are of most concern to you, so I can make sure to represent your interests when we win in November. = Thank you, Mel Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress Mel Hall for Congress P.O. Box 862 South Bend, IN 46624 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Brett Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Last night, President Trump announced his nominee for the Supreme Court. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaac0/34a064cc/b7896f1/70f5e77/1450066540/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friend, Last night, President Trump announced his nominee for the Supreme Court, Federal Appeals Court Judge Brett Kavanaugh. If your heart didn't just sink, you probably don't know Brett Kavanaugh's record. Here are the highlights: Kavanaugh is out of touch with how most Americans feel on so many issues, including assault weapon bans and access to reproductive health care. He has been on the wrong side of history time and time again - his regressive beliefs ought to be relegated to the pages of a history book. With his nomination, voting rights, LGBTQ+ equality, workers' rights, and access to health care - could be on the chopping block. **[Make a donation to my campaign today so I can defend our hard-fought victories and progressive values from the Governor's mansion.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaac0/34a064cc/b7896f1/70f5e74/1450066540/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzEwMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-july?refcode=IE071018-full")** **Now that you've heard Kavanaugh's record. Here's mine:** As House Democratic Leader, I always fought attempts to undermine women's health care access. As Governor, I will keep fighting. I will continue to stand with workers and fight for collective bargaining rights, until every Georgia worker receives a fair wage and is treated with dignity. I will continue to champion civil rights and LGBTQ+ equality, until every Georgian knows that they are welcome here and that they belong in our state. I will fight with all I've got to safeguard a woman's right to choose, until every person has the right to shape their own future. If you stand with me, I'm asking you: **[Will you make a donation to my campaign for Governor so I can continue to fight for our progressive values?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaac0/34a064cc/b7896f1/70f5e74/1450066540/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzEwMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-july?refcode=IE071018-full")** Kavanaugh's disastrous record speaks for itself - but together, our voices can overpower his. And no matter what happens over the next few months, know this: I will continue to show up, stand up, and speak up with you. Yours in the fight, Stacey Abrams
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efaac0/34a064cc/b7896f1/70f5e74/1450066540/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzEwMTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-july?refcode=IE071018-full")**

Friend,

If you needed another reason to make sure we win in November, President Trump gave it to us last night when he nominated Judge Kavanaugh to replace Justice Kennedy on the Supreme Court.

As you saw...

The liberals LOST it.

Now, they are promising to do everything they can to prevent the confirmation of Judge Kavanaugh!

[STAND UP TO SUPPORT JUDGE KAVANAUGH >>](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=06581a22588e4bc3be1997cb092f3425&_e=ryVNDv2lguuRqLi6LzvCGeUQAjdW_BHNDvZFeRiVZB5ZH8gVXmWQx6tbX_l-4otvSxPPrDiS5CzP9TeIshoFvR0UswGy7u-u4TVyhfCL3GGnRh7JVwdx8LZHRP3F6XmkqlIpXNF1bDfUAkMeyB7fnpnWSSYu0R90sqGMUjqDJOv4JuGqa2qnq4-V-3-tq7s7ARt2pC9xFuA-mRjzWnb6RycX9YsrC8jgqVb2E1m8Si2VdHDE5VQ49OQ2yO1h4HRbkZbi9pKOrdaRpU0Z9lkZ-I5c5tWOojZ104goL2S-yFJjvDx7uEV6ktHefAAvOkUZcZwmxf9IElOmNP-uDejHaFeZofJTwE9A-HNhN9PnUCw0lnqDGMkjYSBLjxr7IHtWKsQbGhPQ-liKJQmLBAJ1VoQAIQJYrBPJvTWv-k0q3Mv34hm6X_ttQ9k34Ek0epKb)

Friend, these obstructionist tactics from liberals are just ridiculous.

Americans voted for President Trump in 2016 knowing – and hoping – that he would have the opportunity to appoint MANY conservative justices. By obstructing the confirmation process, liberals are trying to stop the American people AGAIN.

Politicians like Tammy Baldwin won’t take on their party leaders and stand up for you, for your rights, and YOUR Supreme Court nominee.

_But Friend, I always will._

In the Senate, I will always fight to confirm the best people for all of the open positions in the administration, and I will vote to confirm President Trump’s nominees so we can get things DONE for America.

But if liberals like Tammy win in November... we’ll only have to deal with more obstructionists preventing President Trump’s success.

We can’t let that happen. We have to make sure we win in November. And right now, we need to make sure Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed: **[https://leahvukmir.com/support-judge-kavanaugh/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=06581a22588e4bc3be1997cb092f3425&_e=ryVNDv2lguuRqLi6LzvCGeUQAjdW_BHNDvZFeRiVZB5ZH8gVXmWQx6tbX_l-4otvSxPPrDiS5CzP9TeIshoFvR0UswGy7u-u4TVyhfCL3GGnRh7JVwdx8LZHRP3F6XmkqlIpXNF1bDfUAkMeyB7fnpnWSSYu0R90sqGMUjqDJOv4JuGqa2qnq4-V-3-tq7s7ARt2pC9xFuA-mRjzWnb6R4vffXxQ84uOx3AOpsPLLzsiq42mvcHWK79s0J_PAlzVUWTwU5y8lgC9hOXuiek0sfRHeFKUJ9CNK3-V0xFqt27wxRnwP-K3wYTYKFanD_SyN_mKzNkl6PzE1VhI9QvY_JdHDPQQ4UnkLvS0Uzn-1WvQo9IdWzw_4_nWsneJy3MrvqJ9vQm8YeLh4lNJVQaQa6ZUcRXbrSrEbNeqx4uLgf-9p_bphXXh-1A9mEPx0b5O)**

Americans deserve action – not obstruction.
