This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=06581a22588e4bc3be1997cb092f3425&_e=mtsztJmqwvc5dngJ3k3a9_3uIehV3mZ0nINdUNQKDDfGkzuwpZjJ6ApYkvJ0gYrnrbC6CosSTWeumw8tdkA8tFeipq2Ute6YU9UJ60f0tZQ88EKeJmcHd_9UlaISWqud3bxipOfa4lI8ILbuRMz8Usln7qDMG1QID1F7PqkMqwz-lJ-qjusam4fCN_tXzNy_m1uV0kPrmralgieEkrMrC9jzb5kBL_n3tyHBhqKGlkEgKhHKiakxMwrgzBFcAaKV). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=06581a22588e4bc3be1997cb092f3425&_e=ryVNDv2lguuRqLi6LzvCGT61-m_ZDqb8sRok2PTYBXBe8sS2Ghsx8l3U60Kq3Ya29OGYfMTNFRFIcYDjmtD-qcFPRp3bB-BvxGaiz_iQsNljig-fa5sQpko0rzkiGWLQPj32pvYZ2HKImp-eFfvDzmwPK2IuT4dh_1w2shzN0fIxxT7OsuggTre9_pqi69d6pNVROh0PMYoCnHPziAt4QBEHJSFusHM4CfLTpz52iHZSZwBY8YuD-CAhp9G3yK-LJE32ky-3TS6BF4OWwugIEvkUsY6GbP2F7w3BVgPwY059ZqQ1HFA7eLACwrMUPv7_4yWXGTbQExHtmNc4avh5G8Otzjiel_DuzEk9sKYnDeQQbBzt5sV7-RnE0o_VAl7Z) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=06581a22588e4bc3be1997cb092f3425&_e=ryVNDv2lguuRqLi6LzvCGT61-m_ZDqb8sRok2PTYBXCDwMp3YL8zrTmu3r-Zrx8RmBEUmqnww8Ov_ifccUJZmrrMpqxUTbQeUcr7fIQHPVApk7lbFbkwgC0SVLoQ23yFdkvYOdC-6CiYXpnKxc83liq2WRwCTClWa1NgVkDkb16-CiN6PwEDhJT7MbbNTNWHwRTSXiLetsEsto9UhzSfP2dRYQAb8Jti-IFWi-XNUNQIJosgWVt2SMyg46AzNbsGHQVaSeSuNqub6IxaT0BL2OBSZKoNxUqKC6ztKMW7a4ejGsBIOZBocn0KewhUfb_Wq-vPXzz-MvwIgt9EB6vIoBrPwh9TRjtjxYsfvXd7CaR-1ldjxGN5PRVapJBd4cDH) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=06581a22588e4bc3be1997cb092f3425&_e=ryVNDv2lguuRqLi6LzvCGe6_iwCndWzTAnTIfopQujlxARY6hvH9sQweiLVRAPFmTma84O_kvzlngFXFediQIIdnIHFR7-IKhllpo0_QhbtNkY7g1HvutSoEAanNrejsyuQifqn0FxbZUQbNAvz4ze5eKoRmP4IThuS2F4Ju-T2QYUjPyiuN0nPgr47UUc_mJ0cFh6X6RmvYOrVltli6HIfNqgHVTIqIngzvv1SVfuBZnwa3bXWRjDvj_lkqS-43_VaSnKQTktjCcvNb_EPggg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=06581a22588e4bc3be1997cb092f3425&_e=ryVNDv2lguuRqLi6LzvCGQBSBchXInFqoMx5InMpUjtdQAkTnpyL3dp_kexBKodL0apDa40Tkiu_DJDZ4ux9lkVvZa5WqYZ-xL5bxumk2gM8HB1geFHFuiXmn87Su4oSoxT1tjQPIDlCIroOMu4BE8dVFLBO748FWzXsvuT2wbTuqbZWA0tclYFwKA7BBcC-FSY-xPXpsV8xysybWW0pM81cHmeutCdf3Sp_e2LKkq3Xbc2gDwetUXk5OEb8zHFMvvfVVRaJu2Z6DWLDs5ux6Q%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=06581a22588e4bc3be1997cb092f3425&_e=ryVNDv2lguuRqLi6LzvCGQZXXBVUDDrsyjqXbQFfaLZtNL7Er-zlVKy5qxTsH_Fub84YMECC5FMgKgqwM23BEHkgdiP2dT9aZZx7xtWAK7THe9P6t4f0N_rd52JJrAZVF1HdkfHUKhrpOTxfXl4nP_eOcGfLbyAubXPeDJco18NT_xBv640AdTzyDYB-CFz0khHtdoVJUcFBkvEAD-2gV5UQiDrWGA99wVkN0aD1Ox_SLYELWgtIpQsYw49MBX-b4Q_vAmOA9qiUw7m9_-sOuQ%3D%3D) feed. clean_body: If you needed another reason to make sure we win in November, President Trump gave it to us last night when he nominated Judge Kavanaugh to replace... Friend, If you needed another reason to make sure we win in November, President Trump gave it to us last night when he nominated Judge Kavanaugh to replace Justice Kennedy on the Supreme Court. As you saw... The liberals LOST it. Now, they are promising to do everything they can to prevent the confirmation of Judge Kavanaugh! Friend, these obstructionist tactics from liberals are just ridiculous. Americans voted for President Trump in 2016 knowing – and hoping – that he would have the opportunity to appoint MANY conservative justices. By obstructing the confirmation process, liberals are trying to stop the American people AGAIN. Politicians like Tammy Baldwin won’t take on their party leaders and stand up for you, for your rights, and YOUR Supreme Court nominee. But Friend, I always will. In the Senate, I will always fight to confirm the best people for all of the open positions in the administration, and I will vote to confirm President Trump’s nominees so we can get things DONE for America. But if liberals like Tammy win in November... we’ll only have to deal with more obstructionists preventing President Trump’s success. We can’t let that happen. We have to make sure we win in November. And right now, we need to make sure Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed: Americans deserve action – not obstruction. Let’s get Judge Kavanaugh confirmed to our Supreme Court now and put an end to these unfair blocks from the liberal elites. Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

| | Friends, ARE YOU READY? We hope that all of you are ready to put in the work it is going to take to get “all of us” to Capitol Hill! If you haven’t noticed this is turning out to be the year of the underdogs. Candidates who were considered “non-viable” contenders are pulling off upsets across the country. Folks, we can do that here too! In District NY-14 a female bartender, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, who flew under the radar upset the long-time incumbent candidate for her district in the primaries. This happened for two reasons: people in the district were ready for change and many volunteers spent hours canvassing across Queens and The Bronx. We can do this too! How they earned the victory:
* Knocked on over 120,000 doors
* Made over 170,000 phone calls
* Sent 100k+ text messages
* Increased voter turnout by 68% as compared to the last off-year midterm

This was all through the power of grassroots organizers who believed in her message. Now we have to get voters to believe in our message. We have to motivate our neighbors, church members, co-workers, and family members to GET OUT TO VOTE ON NOVEMBER 6TH! If we all do that, I believe we will win. Things you can do to help:
1. clean_body: Friends, ARE YOU READY? We hope that all of you are ready to put in the work it is going to take to get "all of us" to Capitol H | | | | | | | | Friends, ARE YOU READY? We hope that all of you are ready to put in the work it is going to take to get “all of us” to Capitol Hill! If you haven’t noticed this is turning out to be the year of the underdogs. Candidates who were considered “non-viable” contenders are pulling off upsets across the country. Folks, we can do that here too! In District NY-14 a female bartender, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, who flew under the radar upset the long-time incumbent candidate for her district in the primaries. This happened for two reasons: people in the district were ready for change and many volunteers spent hours canvassing across Queens and The Bronx. We can do this too! How they earned the victory: Knocked on over 120,000 doors Made over 170,000 phone calls Sent 100k+ text messages Increased voter turnout by 68% as compared to the last off-year midterm This was all through the power of grassroots organizers who believed in her message. Now we have to get voters to believe in our message. We have to motivate our neighbors, church members, co-workers, and family members to GET OUT TO VOTE ON NOVEMBER 6TH! If we all do that, I believe we will win. Things you can do to help: 1. Show your support with a yard sign: 2. Make a donation: 3. Volunteer to canvass: Hope to see you folks soon! Onward,Jeramey Anderson For Congress A view from the campaign trail: | | | |

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILY's List
subject: Flip the Senate + Protect safe and legal abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4340/24c69fd9/186f0ae41/1882e7e2/1872168442/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES19N_digital_email_20180710_IfRoeFalls_inact&source=WQEFES19N_digital_email_20180710_IfRoeFalls_inact")
---

Peter,

_Roe v. Wade_ is in grave danger.

Yesterday, President Trump announced anti-choice judge Brett Kavanaugh as his pick to replace Justice Kennedy on the Supreme Court.

If _Roe_ is reversed, four states have so-called "trigger laws" that _immediately_ ban abortion.

**[Donate $3 to help flip the Senate and make sure that _Roe v. Wade_ remains intact by giving Democrats approval over Trump's nominees.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4340/24c69fd9/186f0ae41/1882e7e3/1872168442/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180710_email_IfRoeFalls?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+flip+the+Senate+and+mak&utm_campaign=WQEFES19N_digital_email_20180710_IfRoeFalls_inact&source=WQEFES19N_digital_email_20180710_IfRoeFalls_inact")**

Beyond the four states with trigger laws -- Louisiana, Mississippi, North Dakota, and South Dakota -- there are 10 states, including Mississippi, with pre-_Roe_ bans still on the books.

And seven states -- including three that already have trigger laws or pre-_Roe_ bans -- have expressed intent to limit abortion to the maximum extent of the law if _Roe_ is overturned.

That's 17 states where the right to safe and legal abortion will be swiftly at risk or totally gone if Trump's nominee gets the chance to rule on an abortion rights case.

But we can stop this.

We can elect pro-choice Democratic women to flip the Senate and deny confirmation to anti-choice judicial nominees.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to protect _Roe_ and our right to safe and legal abortion:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Save-Roe](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4340/24c69fd9/186f0ae41/1882e61c/1872168442/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180710_email_IfRoeFalls?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgSaveRoe&utm_campaign=WQEFES19N_digital_email_20180710_IfRoeFalls_inact&source=WQEFES19N_digital_email_20180710_IfRoeFalls_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4340/24c69fd9/186f0ae41/1882e61d/1872168442/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180710_email_IfRoeFalls?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFES19N_digital_email_20180710_IfRoeFalls_inact&source=WQEFES19N_digital_email_20180710_IfRoeFalls_inact")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Scott?=
subject: We've got more work to do!
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/philscott/independencedayparades-264093?e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
|

---
| Friend,
---
---
| Two years ago, Vermonters elected me to serve as Governor because they felt that the cost of living and working here had become unaffordable for too many. Change doesn’t happen overnight, but in my first term as Governor, we were able to achieve many goals which bring us closer to overcoming the challenges we face. Here are just a few examples: **• Avoided over $70 million in projected property tax rate increases;** **• Kept statewide residential property tax rates level for two consecutive years;** **• Ensured no new taxes or fees in the General Fund for two consecutive years;** **• Lowered state income tax rates, preventing a $30 million tax increase;** **• Reduced operating costs for businesses by lowering unemployment insurance and workers’ compensation expenses by more than $30 million;** **• Eliminated the income tax on Social Security for low- and middle-income households;** **• Prevented various taxes and fees and other bad fiscal policies; and** **• Proposed and signed various economic development bills** We’ve done this, and much more, all while improving the efficiency and effectiveness of state government services, particularly those designed to help our most vulnerable citizens. _The fact is,_ it’s difficult with the current makeup of the legislature to pass policies that strengthen the economy, help create more jobs and make Vermont more affordable for families and businesses. But, it’s also a fact that we’re making more progress than we have in many years. That’s why I’m still optimistic about the future and**why I’m seeking re-election in 2018!** I’m proud of what we’ve been able to accomplish in just 18 months of this first term, but I know there is much more to do – and I’m more committed than ever to fighting to make Vermont’s economy stronger and our state more affordable. [_Can I count on your support again to get us through the Primary and beyond?_](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=002b8a3e2d&e=19cebfe173) **Your contribution will ensure that we have the resources needed to succeed on August 14****th****and again on November 6****th****.** Thank you for your support. Sincerely,
---
|
---
| [I Support Phil! ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=44299a0d4c&e=19cebfe173 "I Support Phil! ")

body:
Peter,
Because of his vocal support for removing the influence of big money from our political system, J.D. Scholten was one of six candidates to earn the endorsement of **End Citizens United** yesterday!
From Tiffany Muller, President of End Citizens United:
_“Voters across the country are fed up with politicians who prioritize mega-donors and special interests over their constituents. These candidates are committed to fighting the corrosive influence of Big Money in politics and fixing our broken campaign finance system. We’re proud to endorse these reformers and we look forward to helping them win in November.”_
While Steve King receives much of his support from corporate PACs, we’re proud of the fact that J.D. has pledged not to take any corporate PAC money. And so far, this grassroots movement has significantly outraised Steve King. [**_Help us sustain this momentum with a contribution today!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1613310/8629938/1185683401?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM0YjExYi04ZTg0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4XMFWP-cdLGVzpJuA0pv-UJvGNA9qxVjwv5K8kKDG0=)
Team Scholten is a people-powered movement that relies on individual support—to date, more than 11,000 individuals have contributed to this campaign!
[**_Make a contribution today, and let’s show Steve King the true power of the people!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1613311/8629939/1185683401?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM0YjExYi04ZTg0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4XMFWP-cdLGVzpJuA0pv-UJvGNA9qxVjwv5K8kKDG0=)
Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1613312/8629940/1185683401?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YjM0YjExYi04ZTg0LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A4XMFWP-cdLGVzpJuA0pv-UJvGNA9qxVjwv5K8kKDG0=)

name: Team Beto
subject: Ted Cruz and Judge Brett Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Team,
Wanted to be sure you saw our email from last night. Donald Trump picked Judge Brett Kavanaugh to fill a lifetime vacancy on the Supreme Court. Too much is on the line to sit this out.
One of the best ways to fight back right now is to make a grassroots donation to Beto's campaign to take on Ted Cruz and help flip the Senate.
**[Click here to rush an urgent donation of $3 or more to Beto's people-powered campaign.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92004/3b1d797/7bfd8acc/35a9eca3/1713835920/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1807-scotus?refcode=ema180710-rs&amount=3")**
Thanks,
Team Beto
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92004/3b1d797/7bfd8acc/35a9eca3/1713835920/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1807-scotus?refcode=ema180710-rs&amount=3")**
* * *
_Original email from Team Beto, July 9, 2018_
It's official, Friends: Donald Trump has picked his Supreme Court nominee, Judge Brett Kavanaugh. With this selection, Trump and his administration are clearly signaling what's at stake:
* Voting rights, civil rights and workers rights
* Healthcare and protections for those with pre-existing conditions
* A woman's right to choose
* LGBTQ equality
* Getting big money out of politics

This is serious. But there's still time for us to fight back. In order to be confirmed, Kavanaugh needs 51 votes in the Senate. We know exactly how Ted Cruz will vote. So we've got to do everything we can to ensure he's not in the Senate when the vote is called.
And right now, thanks to your support, we're within single digits of Cruz -- and putting a stop to a nominee that will impact our country for decades.
[**Rush an urgent donation of $3 to Beto's campaign to take on Ted Cruz. Winning in November is the most direct way that we can stop Brett Kavanaugh's confirmation. But we can only do it with your help.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92004/3b1d797/7bfd8acc/35a9eca3/1713835920/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1807-scotus?refcode=ema180710-rs&amount=3")
We can't underscore how consequential this new justice will be. Only weeks ago, the Supreme Court issued close rulings on the travel ban, workers' rights, voting rights and a woman's right to choose. And we know that more attacks on our values, on the people of Texas, are coming.
**How do we fight back? Send Beto to the Senate so he can be a voice for the people, not a vote for corporations and special interests.**
[**Give a donation of $3 right now so we can win this race in November and protect everything we care so much about.**](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92004/3b1d797/7bfd8acc/35a9eca3/1713835920/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1807-scotus?refcode=ema180710-rs&amount=3")
Thanks for being with us.
Team Beto
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92004/3b1d797/7bfd8acc/35a9eca3/1713835920/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-1807-scotus?refcode=ema180710-rs&amount=3")**

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92004/3b1d797/7bfd8acc/35a9eca4/1713835920/VEsA/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") [ Click here to update your contact information.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92004/3b1d797/7bfd8acc/35a9eca5/1713835920/VEsB/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92004/3b1d797/7bfd8acc/35a9eca6/1713835920/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

body:

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: it should be about YOUR health
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=single_payer_fundraiser&n=1)
---
Friend --
Many people describe healthcare as the single greatest political challenge of our time. The United States is one of the only developed countries in the entire world that does not guarantee quality and affordable healthcare to all of its citizens. **That is disgraceful.** It is time to put and end to the skyrocketing prices of treatment that fatten the wallets of CEOs, pharmaceutical companies, and the politicians who take their money. A vote for Richard is a vote for **single-payer health care**. Richard's opponent Tina Smith **does not support** this commonsense solution. Instead, she has offered small, band-aid fixes that will **maintain the status quo** and leave millions uninsured and without treatment. Tina Smith is **NOT** the candidate we need to address this monumental challenge. We need the voice of a candidate who will stand up to the special interests and lobbyists who keep our healthcare costs high; a candidate who is not afraid to make waves; and a candidate who will not run away from the opportunity to debate and defend his positions to the voters. **We need Richard Painter.** Your support will help make sure you will have a voice in Washington, not just the deep pockets of lobbyists and millionaire CEO executives. [](http://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=single_payer_fundraiser&n=2 "Join the fight!") Thank you,

Painter For Minnesota
[http://www.painterminnesota.com/](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=single_payer_fundraiser&n=3)
---
| [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRWPMinnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=single_payer_fundraiser&n=4) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRWPMinnesota&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=single_payer_fundraiser&n=5) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Frwpminnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=single_payer_fundraiser&n=6)

name: Virginia Democrats - Bruce Sinclair
subject: Derek, want to help elect Democrats this year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Our Weekend of Action starts in 3 days - will you join us?
|
---
[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1266/3e0906/685bcbdd/3e359c93/3001036253/VEsH/ "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20180710_1_FIELD_BS_Hotleads&source=20180710_1_FIELD_BS_Hotleads")

| | Here in Virginia, we're building a team that will make sure we re-elect Tim Kaine to the Senate, take back the House, and help secure victories for Democrats all the way down the ticket.

_We have neighborhood teams growing from Arlington to Chesapeake to Roanoke, and everywhere in between!_

Our field offices are now open and we have trained staff and volunteers who want to work with you to make sure your neighbors turn out to vote on [November 6th.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1266/3e0906/685bcbdd/3e359c92/3001036253/VEsE/ "https://timkaine.com/volunteer/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+November+6th&utm_campaign=20180710_1_FIELD_BS_Hotleads&source=20180710_1_FIELD_BS_Hotleads")

**Ready to get involved with the campaign or want to find out more about how you can help?[Click here and sign up online so a member of our team can be in touch with you ->](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1266/3e0906/685bcbdd/3e359c91/3001036253/VEsF/ "https://timkaine.com/volunteer/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+and+sign+up+online+so+a+membe&utm_campaign=20180710_1_FIELD_BS_Hotleads&source=20180710_1_FIELD_BS_Hotleads")**

If you've been waiting to get involved with this election, now is the perfect time to do so. This weekend we have a **statewide "Weekend of Action,"** so plenty of people will be volunteering in their communities for the very first time!

name: Rapid Response (via Heinrich HQ)
subject: We have Trump's Supreme Court nominee:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | **ALERT: President Trump nominates Brett Kavanaugh for Supreme Court**

We need a rapid response effort to fight back against confirming the president's nominee and legitimizing McConnell's broken system. Will you be one of the 10,000 signers we need in the next 48 hours?

[**SIGN ON IF YOU AGREE: We need to fix the broken system - and no vote on Kavanaugh until we do!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b667/43d8135f/60c075f0/5100f4bf/861322396/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/OPPOSE-KAVANAUGH?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+ON+IF+YOU+AGREE+We+need+to+fix+the+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1")

* * *

Here we go again.

Mitch McConnell rigged our political system through historic obstruction and changed the rules to benefit Republicans. Now, President Trump has nominated an extreme conservative who will shift the balance of the court for a generation. Until we fix the mess he created, I am not going to legitimize Mitch McConnell's political games.

Why? Because **the Senate cannot be a rubber stamp for this president.

[To respond to this latest news, we're working to gather 10,000 signatures in the next 48 hours to show Americans are united against confirming President Trump's Supreme Court pick.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b667/43d8135f/60c075f0/5100f4be/861322396/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/OPPOSE-KAVANAUGH?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+To+respond+to+this+latest+news+wersquore&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1")**

[SAY NO TO KAVANAUGH](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b667/43d8135f/60c075f0/5100f4a1/861322396/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/OPPOSE-KAVANAUGH?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+SAY+NO+TO+KAVANAUGH&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1")
The stakes are too high -- we can't sit by while a rigged process installs a Supreme Court justice who will advance an extreme conservative agenda and roll back decades of progress on women's rights, voting rights, health care, and workers' rights.

[**That 's why we need you to raise your voice with us. You can add your name here and be one of the 10,000 supporters we need to stand against confirming President Trump's Supreme Court nominee!**](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b667/43d8135f/60c075f0/5100f4a0/861322396/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/OPPOSE-KAVANAUGH?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Thatrsquos+why+we+need+you+to+raise+your&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1")

[OPPOSE KAVANAUGH](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b667/43d8135f/60c075f0/5100f4a3/861322396/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/OPPOSE-KAVANAUGH?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+OPPOSE+KAVANAUGH&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_90DO_180710_1_1")
Thanks for your support,

Team Martin Heinrich

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: I want to personally thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
** I just received the kindest compliment.
------------------------------------------------------------

"Ian, you're running the best campaign I've ever seen."

Thank you. I'm always very moved when people are excited about my candidacy. There's nothing like excitement to propel a message, and our campaign has always had success at generating enthusiasm. But we're also running a grassroots campaign that refuses to take money from corporate PACs. That means we're far from being funded like other Congressional races, so when I hear that we're the best campaign she's ever seen, I have to ask why.

The answer only reinforces the confidence I have. She told me this campaign is the best because we go to every district, every county, and every town. She told me this campaign is the best because we reach out to as many people as possible; when she wanted to meet the person who wanted to become her representative, we made it easy. She told me this campaign is the best because we're running on issues people actually care about and because we're even taking time to talk to the people who haven't been engaged by the DFL in years.

So now I have to thank you, because that compliment wasn't just for me. That compliment was for this entire team, and you're part of it. We're the best campaign because we have the backing of amazing volunteers and the donations of generous people that believe in democracy.

Now keep us going with you donation, too! (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=iansemail&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=938f00e300-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_07_10_06_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-938f00e300-9291445) We're constantly buying new literature for the doors, signs for your yards, and shirts for our ever growing volunteer population. We have plans for billboards, polling, and the ability to feed our volunteers, but we can't do it without the funding we receive directly from people like you. Get excited, and help us spread the message!
Contribute (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=iansemail&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=938f00e300-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_07_10_06_23&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-938f00e300-9291445)

name: Senate Update (2)
subject: why we're the GOP's top priority:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**B R E A K I N G N E W S:**
McConnell-linked Super PAC pouring $11.2 million into Nevada's race to decide Senate control.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Kyle=20Hupfer?=
subject: Will Democrat Donnelly Vote to Confirm?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Last night, President Donald Trump made history again with his nomination of Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the United States Supreme Court. With his... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/will-democrat-donnelly-vote-to-confirm?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **President Donald Trump Nominates Judge Brett Kavanaugh to Supreme Court**
_But Will Democrat Donnelly Vote to Confirm?_
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fe48ceb917&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | Fellow Republicans,

**Last night, President Donald Trump made history again with his nomination of Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the United States Supreme Court. **With his pick to fill the spot left by retiring Justice Anthony Kennedy, President Trump is putting forward an excellent, mainstream jurist with impeccable legal credentials....and he'll apply our U.S. Constitution as it's written.

In case you're not familiar with Judge Kavanaugh, here's some background:
* **Judge Kavanaugh currently sits on the D.C. Circuit and has more than 300 published opinions, where he's built a track record of applying the law as written and endorsing the text, structure and original understanding of the U.S. Constitution. **
* _Judge Kavanaugh is known as a "judge's judge." He's a true thought leader, with opinions that are regularly cited by courts across the country. The Supreme Court has even endorsed his opinions more than a dozen times._
* **Judge Kavanaugh has devoted his career to public service, most notably working as an associate White House counsel, as an assistant to the president and staff secretary to former President George W. Bush. **
* _In his time away from the bench, Judge Kavanaugh is dedicated to his family and his community. He coaches a youth basketball team, is a reader at his church, serves meals to needy families and tutors children at local elementary schools. _

Judge Kavanaugh is just the Supreme Court Justice we need. But of course, you can already guess how the Democrats are responding. **Democrats are throwing the book at Judge Kavanaugh, claiming that he's a threat to women, minorities and our democracy. We've heard it all before, and we know it's a lie.**

---
| [SHARE ON FACEBOOK: CONFIRM JUDGE KAVANAUGH!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d7ae50d806&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SHARE ON FACEBOOK: CONFIRM JUDGE KAVANAUGH!")
---
| But that's where you come in: **We need Democrat Joe Donnelly to stand with Hoosiers, and not his D.C. Democrat bosses. We need him to vote to confirm Judge Kavanaugh, and to do that, we need to let Democrat Donnelly know that we're watching..._or else he'll just do what he does 84% of the time, which is vote in lock-step with his Democrat boss Chuck Schumer. _**

[Please consider sharing this post on Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=46015b3973&e=1acd9bb3d6), and sharing that you support the nomination of Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the U.S. Supreme Court!

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party
---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=64d7266785&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b7a96df388&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dr.=20Paul=20Gosar?=
subject: Breaking union control of the IRS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
On the heels of the Janus decision, I'm joining the Trump Administration efforts to roll back the influence of the Labor Bosses | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ed6b1b197642/breaking-union-control-of-the-irs?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| | Did you see my latest proposal? I want break up union control of the IRS.

The last thing we need after the IRS’s abuse of power targeting conservatives, is union bosses and their cronies using the IRS to advance their political agenda. A recent report in the Wall Street Journal highlighted organized labor’s unprecedented spending in 2016, with nearly all of it going to Democrats.

That’s why I introduced the Preventing Unionization of Revenue Service Employees, or PURSE Act, which would prohibit IRS employees from unionizing. The role of the IRS is too important to allow the political influence of organized labor in its operations.
---
|
---
| Conservatives scored a major victory with the Supreme Court decision in Janus v. AFSCME, which ends compulsory union dues for political activity. This will end the requirement that union members who don’t support the liberal candidates and policies of the union bosses, will no longer be required to turn over their hard-earned wages to fund liberals. This is a major win for workers, too!

But we still have a lot of work to do to curb the influence of organized labor on Washington. With my legislation, we can further protect the privacy of our citizens while pushing back on labor bosses.

Join me in this fight! With your support, we can push back on the union bosses and Make America Great Again!

---
|
---
| Dr. Paul Gosar
Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District
---
| [Donate](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=faac09e6af&e=7ca82c1e3d "Donate")

body:
Hi Peter,
I wanted to send you a quick note letting you know where we stand with this deadline before making an important ask of you.
Here's the situation: We're about 1,200 donations short of reaching our 10,000 donation goal. We're closing the gap, but we're still behind where we need to be. We only have until midnight on Thursday to hit this goal, so I need to ask:
Will you make a $3 donation right now to make sure we reach our goal? Please use this link:
**[go.ZephyrForNY.com/deadline](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb6/6e822e2f/1bd1c25e/41727ee6/388159489/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MTAtMi1hIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180710-2-a")**
I'll be blunt: When this deadline ends, we have to publicly report our numbers, and if we miss our goal, our opponents and the media will know it. That could be a major problem for us, so we need your help to avoid it.
Thank you in advance for your donation, Peter. It means a lot to me.
\- Zephyr

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: One Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

What a difference a year makes.

Exactly one year ago today, we launched our campaign to **restore accountable leadership in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District**. It all started with a few volunteers, a supportive family, and the belief that if we worked hard enough, we could make this district competitive, and improve the lives of hard working Virginian families.

365 days later, we've done just that, and more. We've moved this race from being rated as a "Solid/Strong Republican" stronghold to being designated a "Toss Up" by some of the top analysts in the country. And we've done it by being accessible to the community, focusing on important issues, and motivating the voters of the 7th District to **work for the change we want to see in our democracy**.

I am incredibly proud of all that we've accomplished, and grateful for the support we've received from so many in this community and beyond. But this race is still going to be a hard fight, and it's crucial that we keep making progress over these last 118 days. We still have tens of thousands of voters to contact, and we cannot do it alone. We need resources to power our outreach efforts and get the message out to more voters. [**Can you make a contribution now and help ensure a win in November?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qhVItDb5XEKJiBp4sA6DvCIuZaQRZkyynX7BA03fQWI=/-7oUYstNZvYtZXkSBBAt-AuILufUlItscWUT8J30yAg=?refcode=oneyear)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qhVItDb5XEKJiBp4sA6DvCIuZaQRZkyynX7BA03fQWI=/-7oUYstNZvYtZXkSBBAt-AuILufUlItscWUT8J30yAg=?refcode=oneyear)

The experience of running for office this past year has been one of the most gratifying and awakening experiences of my life. I've never felt more connected to my community, nor more confident in the health and strength of our democracy. And when I get to Congress, **I will fight every day to make it even stronger**.

Thank you. For everything.

-Abigail

clean_body: Peter, What a difference a year makes. Exactly one year ago today, we launched our campaign to restore accountable leadership in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. It all started with a few volunteers, a supportive family, and the belief that if we worked hard enough, we could make this district competitive, and improve the lives of hard working Virginian families. 365 days later, we've done just that, and more. We've moved this race from being rated as a "Solid/Strong Republican" stronghold to being designated a "Toss Up" by some of the top analysts in the country. And we've done it by being accessible to the community, focusing on important issues, and motivating the voters of the 7th District to work for the change we want to see in our democracy. I am incredibly proud of all that we've accomplished, and grateful for the support we've received from so many in this community and beyond. But this race is still going to be a hard fight, and it's crucial that we keep making progress over these last 118 days. We still have tens of thousands of voters to contact, and we cannot do it alone. We need resources to power our outreach efforts and get the message out to more voters. The experience of running for office this past year has been one of the most gratifying and awakening experiences of my life. I've never felt more connected to my community, nor more confident in the health and strength of our democracy. And when I get to Congress, I will fight every day to make it even stronger. Thank you. For everything. -Abigail = Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Mary Ellen Smith, bobcasey.com
subject: this is what's at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e613c/51dbcc2a/1bcf06a3/3a75a22/675112951/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Team:

I want every voter to understand how much Senator Bob Casey truly cares about the people of Pennsylvania. When his constituents share their hopes and their worries with him, Bob really listens. Those folks -- talking about labor unions or affordable health care or LGBT rights -- were on his mind when he took a stand against President Trump's far-right, corporate Supreme Court nomination process.

[**_Bob knew he would be attacked for taking a stand, and now he needs your help to fight back -- donate $5 or more to let Bob know you are on his side._**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180710_fr2_v1s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Judge Kavanaugh, who corporate special interests suggested and President Trump nominated to the Supreme Court, is a creature of Washington with deep ties to the Bush administration. We can't trust him to protect us. Labor rights, the Affordable Care Act and voter protection could be destroyed by a conservative Supreme Court, so we need to rally around every Senator willing to take a stand on this issue, including Bob.

**With a Supreme Court confirmation hearing looming, we can't afford to lose Bob's voice for working families. Your donation will go directly toward protecting this Senate seat so Bob can keep fighting for us.** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180710_fr2_v1s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Thanks,

Mary Ellen

Mary Ellen Smith
Campaign Manager
Bob Casey for Senate

name: Mike Braun
subject: President Trump Delivers Again

body:
[](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjpttuy-kujulhlke-y/)
---
| | Friend- When Hoosier conservatives voted overwhelmingly to elect Donald Trump as President, they did so on the promise that he would nominate constitutionalists to the Supreme Court who would protect our liberties. President Trump delivered on that promise when he nominated Neil Gorsuch, and **now he has delivered again with Judge Brett Kavanaugh.** [](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjpttuy-kujulhlke-j/) With the nomination of Brett Kavanaugh, we can rest assured that our religious liberties, Second Amendment rights, and the right to life will be defended for generations to come. [**Join me in demanding that Senator Joe Donnelly do the right thing for Hoosiers and vote to confirm Judge Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court!**](https://mikebraun.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jjpttuy-kujulhlke-t/) \- Mike |
